data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for the service menu displayed on Google.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the service menu being displayed on Google, but the provided evidence does not include any checks or confirmations related to this specific requirement. While there are multiple passed steps indicating successful bookings and configurations, none of them address the visibility of the service menu on Google, which is a critical component of the requirement. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the evidence provided, leading to an inconclusive verdict.
gaps: No evidence of service menu displayed on Google.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
